name: Read
description: Read a UTF-8 text file from the filesystem.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to read.

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (1-based).

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read.

name: Write
description: Write (or overwrite) a file with the given text content.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to write.

content.description: Text content to write to the file.

name: Glob
description: List files matching a glob pattern, sorted by modification time.

path.description: Directory to search in. Defaults to current directory.

name: AskUserQuestion
description: Ask the user a question and wait for their typed response.

question.description: The question to present to the user.

options.description: Optional list of suggested answers to display.

name: Bash
description: Execute a shell command and return stdout/stderr.

description.description: Short description of what the command does.

name: Edit
description: Replace an exact string in a file with a new string.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to edit.

old_string.description: The exact text to find and replace.

replace_all.description: If true, replace every occurrence instead of just the first.

name: Grep
description: Search file contents with a regex pattern using ripgrep.

path.description: File or directory to search. Defaults to current directory.

context.description: Lines of context to show around each match.

name: TaskCreate
description: Create a new tracked task with a subject and description.

subject.description: Short imperative title for the task.

description.description: Detailed description of what needs to be done.

activeForm.description: Present-continuous label shown while the task is in progress.

name: TaskGet
description: Retrieve full details for a task by its ID.

taskId.description: The ID of the task to retrieve.

name: TaskList
description: List all tasks with their status and owner.

name: TaskUpdate
description: Update a task's status, subject, description, or owner.

taskId.description: The ID of the task to update.

owner.description: Agent or person responsible for the task.

name: TaskStop
description: Stop a running background task by its ID.

task_id.description: The ID of the background task to stop.
